channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Spanish Prime Minister Zapatero Faces Investigation
item.description: A Spanish court is probing Zapatero for alleged influence peddling and related offenses.

item.title: Special Ed Teachers Turn to AI to Ease Workload
item.description: More special educators are using AI for lesson plans, despite potential risks.

item.title: Bees have coexisted with humans for millennia, yet the origin of their name remains unknown.
item.description: Despite its small size and simple name, the bee is one of the most vital and industrious species on Earth.

item.title: Four key insights from Tuesday's primaries across six states.
item.description: As Trump continues his winning streak, general election contenders emerge in competitive districts and states.
